full_text:
Project 9 EyeMT
Project Overview
Integrating multiomics data to understand the role of diverse immune cell types—specifically T-cells and
myeloid cells—and their spatial interactions in shaping cancer immune escape mechanisms and overall
patient clinical outcomes.
Core Data Modalities
Proteomics: Cyclic Immunofluorescence (tCycIF)
Spatial Transcriptomics: GeoMx (performed on adjacent tissue slides)
Genomics: Whole Exome Sequencing (WES) via iCAN database

Data Architecture & Storage
All data and analysis scripts are located on the cluster under h30492/farkkilab2/ .
h30492/farkkilab2/
├── Data/
│ ├── clinical_data/ # Patient clinical metadata
│ ├── geomx/ # GeoMx spatial transcriptomics files
│ ├── cycif/ # tCycIF multiplex images & segmented cell 
data
│ └── extra_datasets/
│ ├── ican/ # Germline & somatic mutations (iCAN db 
reports)

oMx spatial transcriptomics files
│ ├── cycif/ # tCycIF multiplex images & segmented cell 
data
│ └── extra_datasets/
│ ├── ican/ # Germline & somatic mutations (iCAN db 
reports)
│ └── scRNAseq/ # Reference datasets for GeoMx 
deconvolutionREADME.md 2026-05-26

└── Data_analysis/ # Downstream analysis scripts (GeoMx, 
tCycIF, iCAN)
Batch Configurations & Exclusions
Batch 1 (2022 / Repeated 09.2024): 16 samples (10 paired, 6 post-chemotherapy). Analyzed via
tCycIF with Batch 2 Antibody panel.
Reference: Launonen et al. 2024 ("Chemotherapy induces myeloid-driven spatial T-cell
exhaustion in ovarian cancer").
Batch 2 (Autumn 2024): 14 samples for tCycIF / 13 for GeoMx (4 paired, remaining post-
chemotherapy unpaired).
⚠ Exclusion:S188-iOme removed from GeoMx due to severe tissue folding on the slide.
Batch 3 (Spring 2025): 30 samples for tCycIF / 28 for GeoMx (12/10 paired, 18 post-
chemotherapy unpaired).
⚠ Exclusion:S027_pOme and S027_iOme pair removed from GeoMx due to poor quality.
